package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for log_printf_for_production: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `log.Printf` (stdlib) usage in web service handler code
type CaseLogPrintfForProductionDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseLogPrintfForProductionModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseLogPrintfForProductionRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseLogPrintfForProductionModel
}

type CaseLogPrintfForProductionService struct {
    repo *CaseLogPrintfForProductionRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseLogPrintfForProductionAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeLogPrintfForProduction(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseLogPrintfForProductionDTO) error {
    focus := "log_printf_for_production"
    _ = focus
    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "handled", "rule", "log_printf_for_production")
    log_printf_production_negative := map[string]int{"log": 1, "printf": 2, "production": 3}
    log_printf_production_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    log_negative_0 := fmt.Sprintf("log=%s", input)
    _ = log_negative_0
    printf_negative_1 := log_printf_production_negative["printf"] + len(input)
    _ = printf_negative_1
    production_negative_2 := log_printf_production_negative["production"] + len(input)
    _ = production_negative_2
    return nil
}
